allow: Bash(powershell -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; \\$excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; \\$excel.Visible = \\$false; \\$workbook = \\$excel.Workbooks.Open\('C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\ClaudeCode\\Synergy\\Config\\Tools\\Datas\\__enums__.xlsx'\); \\$sheet = \\$workbook.Sheets.Item\(1\); \\$usedRange = \\$sheet.UsedRange; \\$rowCount = \\$usedRange.Rows.Count; Write-Host 'Sheet name:' \\$sheet.Name; Write-Host 'Total rows:' \\$rowCount; Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'First 100 rows \(Column B, H, I\):'; for \(\\$i = 1; \\$i -le [Math]::Min\(100, \\$rowCount\); \\$i++\) { \\$b = \\$sheet.Cells.Item\(\\$i, 2\).Text; \\$h = \\$sheet.Cells.Item\(\\$i, 8\).Text; \\$colI = \\$sheet.Cells.Item\(\\$i, 9\).Text; if \(\\$b -or \\$h -or \\$colI\) { Write-Host \\"\\$i : B=[\\$b] H=[\\$h] I=[\\$colI]\\" } }; \\$workbook.Close\(\\$false\); \\$excel.Quit\(\)" 2>&1 | iconv -f UTF-16LE -t UTF-8)
